name: Doglegg Golf
address: 2551 Texas Ave S Ste E1, College Station, TX 77840
about: Doglegg Golf is an indoor golf simulator venue offering a climate-controlled environment for year-round play. The facility features large, comfortable bays equipped with state-of-the-art technology to provide a realistic and immersive golfing experience. It aims to create a community-focused space for golfers to develop their skills and socialize, providing convenient tee times day or night and accommodating players of all skill levels from beginner to scratch golfer.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Uneekor Eye XO2 launch monitors with 'Club Optix' technology for precise swing analysis
GSPro simulator software with over 1,800 courses and realistic ball physics
Climate-controlled environment allowing for play year-round in perfect conditions
Flexible booking system powered by Alba Play for day and night tee times
No-annual-contract monthly memberships for regular players

food_and_drink.notes: Pre-packaged snacks available for purchase; guests can bring their own food.
No bar service; guests can bring their own refreshments.

simulator_hardware.notes: Uses three cameras to capture ball and club data, equipped with 'Club Optix' showing slow-motion video of club-to-ball impact.

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators. Club stickers are not required.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and/or refreshments?
faq.answer: Yes, guests are welcome to bring their own food and refreshments. The venue also offers bottled water, canned drinks, and some pre-packaged snacks for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing time can vary, but the indoor simulator setup allows for faster rounds compared to traditional golf, typically taking around 2-3 hours depending on the group size and pace.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Doglegg Golf is suitable for all skill levels, including beginners and juniors, and can accommodate families.
